project: Ghana Emergency Preparedness, Warning & Disaster Response Platform
epic: EPIC 15: Advanced AI, Simulation, And Resource Forecasting
notes: First-pass real-time flood simulation added to services/ml-service with POST/GET /api/v1/ml/flood/simulations, deterministic logistic scoring across the NADAA-070 feature grid, rainfall/water-level scenario overrides, versioned frames with GeoJSON polygons, assumptions and limitations. Authority-dashboard FloodSimulationPanel renders scenario form, frame slider, severity summary, and Leaflet overlay. Shared TypeScript contracts, smoke script, docs, and dashboard record added. Output is decision support only with human-review safety policy.
